pr.title: Record: DeepQuant V10b — 11L INT6 + 8ep LoRA TTT (val_bpb=0.6430)

output.summary: INT6 11-layer Transformer runs 8-epoch cosine LoRA TTT with bias tuning and temperature rescaling to specialize per-document eval outputs.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT happens during evaluation but the model is not trained exclusively on validation data.
techniques: bias tuning + temperature rescale for calibrated outputs
INT6 quantized 11-layer backbone with zigzag GPU balancing
